title: Walt Disney: The Power of Imagination
short_teaser: A dreamer changed entertainment by believing stories could become experiences.
story: Walt Disney started with a simple idea: create stories that brought people joy. Through animation, characters, and experiences, he built something much larger than movies. He created emotional connections with audiences around the world.
impact: Great businesses often begin by understanding how people want to feel. Disney was not only selling entertainment. He was creating experiences.
spark_application: What feeling do you want people to experience when they interact with your work?
